positive: A stylized, minimalist graphic illustration of a mystical constellation forming an ancient, protective shield. The design features elegant, stylized celestial bodies—stars, crescent moons, and planetary orbits—rendered in deep indigo, celestial gold, and cool turquoise. The central constellation must be highly contrasting and centered, creating a striking negative space effect. The overall aesthetic should be inspired by celestial cartography and occult symbolism, designed for high-contrast, single-color printing on fabric. Composition must be clean, bold, and symmetrical, suitable for apparel printing, with crisp lines and sharp edges. Flat graphic style, vector art look, highly detailed, symmetrical composition, sticker art, woodcut print aesthetic.
